← All NHC examples

NHC1 — multi-race: race N+1 uses race N's newTcf as tcfApplied

Scoring system: NHC1    α (blend factor): — 
4 boats, 3 races, SWNHC2015 default profile.

Race 1: starting TCFs 0.95/1.00/1.05/1.10; ETs 3000/3600/4200/4800.
Race 2: shaken up — Alpha slow (4500), Delta fast (3300); Beta/Gamma unchanged.
Race 3: same finishes as race 2.

Verifies the propagation contract: each boat's tcfApplied in race N
equals its newTcf from race N-1 (after 3-dp rounding).

Series totals (no discards):
  Alpha: 1 + 4 + 4 = 9  (one 1st, two 4ths)
  Beta:  2 + 2 + 2 = 6  (three 2nds, no wins)
  Gamma: 3 + 3 + 3 = 9  (three 3rds, no wins)
  Delta: 4 + 1 + 1 = 6  (two wins, one 4th)

A8.2 tie-breaking (most firsts): Delta beats Beta (2 vs 0);
Alpha beats Gamma (1 vs 0). Final order: Delta, Beta, Alpha, Gamma.
─── Race 1 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ─── Race 2 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ─── Race 3 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Race 1

Gun time: 14:00:00   Finishers: 4   CTavg: 67m 15s   mean(TCF): 1.0250
μ(S): 1.0127   σ(S): 0.2347   extreme if S > 1.3647 or < 0.7780 (1)   P50: 0.646154   W51: 0.588785   Z51: 0.997030
RankNameSail # Finish timeETTCFappliedCT QSαZadjnew TCF Points

3 Gamma 3 15:10:00 70m 00s 1.0500 73m 30s 0.9231 0.8791 0.150 1.0187 -0.0340 1.0160 3
4 Delta 4 15:20:00 80m 00s 1.1000 88m 00s 0.8077 0.7343 † 0.075 1.0781 -0.0250 1.0750 4
